To determine the density of Freon-12 (R-12) at 2 degrees Celsius and 101325 Pa, it's important to first understand its phase at these conditions. The boiling point of R-12 at one atmosphere (101325 Pa is approximately 1 atmosphere) is -29.75°C.[1](https://makina.deu.edu.tr/wp-content/uploads/2017/09/5Table.pdf), [2](http://joho.p.free.fr/EC/ENERGIE/_Ressources/FLUIDES%20Frigorig%C3%A8nes/Dupont%20de%20Nemours/www.dupont.com/suva/emea/pdf/thermo_freon12.pdf) Since 2°C is significantly above its boiling point, Freon-12 will be in the superheated vapor phase under these conditions.

Thermodynamic property tables for Freon-12, often based on data from the NIST REFPROP Database, contain information for superheated vapor, including density or specific volume, at various temperatures and pressures. [3](https://www.scribd.com/doc/48956095/Refrigerant-R12-properties), [1](https://makina.deu.edu.tr/wp-content/uploads/2017/09/5Table.pdf), [2](http://joho.p.free.fr/EC/ENERGIE/_Ressources/FLUIDES%20Frigorig%C3%A8nes/Dupont%20de%20Nemours/www.dupont.com/suva/emea/pdf/thermo_freon12.pdf)These tables typically provide pressure in kPa or MPa and temperature in Celsius or Kelvin, with corresponding specific volume (V, in m³/kg) or density (ρ, in kg/m³) values.

Ho[3](https://www.scribd.com/doc/48956095/Refrigerant-R12-properties), [1](https://makina.deu.edu.tr/wp-content/uploads/2017/09/5Table.pdf)wever, the provided search results do not include the specific Superheated Vapor Table for R-12 that would allow direct lookup or interpolation of the density at exactly 2°C and 101325 Pa (or 101.325 kPa). While sources indicate the existence and type of such tables, the [3](https://www.scribd.com/doc/48956095/Refrigerant-R12-properties), [1](https://makina.deu.edu.tr/wp-content/uploads/2017/09/5Table.pdf), [4](https://vertexaisearch.cloud.google.com/grounding-api-redirect/AUZIYQFHagHXjz6SwmzBcLT56tpsQO48BZRVFXeS9swD2wmTcGqdlaruY2O-SuRF-uidLP-JEL2iGaEcFS9QvCRD-En5rj0aq4CjJg8N6pRrbSj3MAuGXiudHJcxVowXpytVk4AtC9Q8F4oRgcFH-mRU0TCNe_LyA9KbBQ2bvdPAVDhy)actual numerical values at the requested conditions are not present in the snippets.
